comments.comment:
"This facility (01-09) is reporting NOx, CO, PM10 and PM2.5 emissions for 2015. This facility reported NOx for 2014. The following changes occurred from 2014 to 2015, respectively:
1) NOx emissions increased by 119%
2) CO emissions increase 276%
3) PM10 and PM2.5  emissions increased by 464%
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Increased run time on two (2) 1480 hp Waukesha compressor engines
2) Increased run time on one (1) 1365 hp G 3516 LE compressor engines
3) increased flare volume from 38.2 m3 to 378.0 m3"

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (01-09) is reporting NOx emissions for 2014. This facility reported NOx, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions for 2013. The following changes occurred from 2013 to 2014, respectively:
1) NOx emissions decreased by 49%
2) PM10 emissions decreased by 88%
3) PM10 emissions decreased by 88%
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Decreased run time on two (2) 850 hp Waukesha gensets
2) Decreased run time on two (2) 1480 hp Waukesha compressor engines
3) 2014 production remained similar to 2013.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (01-09) is reporting NOx, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions for 2013. This facility did not exceed any CAC thresholds in 2012. The following changes occurred from 2012 to 2013, respectively:
1) NOx emissions increased from 87.08 to 138.03 tonnes (+59%)
2) PM10 emissions increased from 1.06 to 1.73 tonnes (+63%)
3) PM2.5 emissions increased from 1.06 to 1.73 tonnes (+63%)
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Increased run time on two (2) 850 hp Waukesha gensets from 3,828 to 8,760 hours
2) Increased run time on two (2) 1480 hp Waukesha compressor engines from 5,475 to 8,760 hours
3) Increased flaring volume from 358.6 e3m3 to 588.6 e3m3 (+64%).
4) Increase in production.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site
